meaning: n.不清不楚,不可辨认,模糊
examples: The illegibility mathematics is used for evaluating water quality.
PK searching method based on classification tree and illegibility matching are developed.
Abnormal CT imaging of pancreas include swell, tumor, illegibility of peripancreas fat and low density areas in contrast pancreas and so on.
But despite my innate aptitude for illegibility, the four handwriting recognition programs we tested had little difficulty translating my jagged scratches into neat, clean, digital type.
